command: attach-session
  alias: attach
  bool-flags: dErx
  arg-flag: -c working-directory
  arg-flag: -f flags
  arg-flag: -t target-session

command: bind-key
  alias: bind
  bool-flags: nr
  arg-flag: -T key-table
  arg-flag: -N note
  positional: key (required)
  positional: command (optional)
  positional: argument (optional,variadic)

command: break-pane
  alias: breakp
  bool-flags: abdP
  arg-flag: -F format
  arg-flag: -n window-name
  arg-flag: -s src-pane
  arg-flag: -t dst-window

command: capture-pane
  alias: capturep
  bool-flags: aCeJMNpPqT
  arg-flag: -b buffer-name
  arg-flag: -E end-line
  arg-flag: -S start-line
  arg-flag: -t target-pane

command: choose-buffer
  bool-flags: NrZ
  arg-flag: -F format
  arg-flag: -f filter
  arg-flag: -K key-format
  arg-flag: -O sort-order
  arg-flag: -t target-pane
  positional: template (optional)

  arg-flag: -F format
  arg-flag: -f filter
  arg-flag: -K key-format
  arg-flag: -O sort-order
  arg-flag: -t target-pane
  positional: template (optional)

  arg-flag: -f filter
  arg-flag: -K key-format
  arg-flag: -O sort-order
  arg-flag: -t target-pane
  positional: template (optional)

command: clear-history
  alias: clearhist
  bool-flags: H
  arg-flag: -t target-pane

command: clear-prompt-history
  alias: clearphist
  arg-flag: -T prompt-type

command: clock-mode
  arg-flag: -t target-pane

command: command-prompt
  positional: -1beFiklN (optional)
  positional: -I inputs (optional)
  positional: -p prompts (optional)
  positional: -t target-client (optional)
  positional: -T prompt-type (optional)
  positional: template (optional)

command: confirm-before
  alias: confirm
  bool-flags: by
  arg-flag: -c confirm-key
  arg-flag: -p prompt
  arg-flag: -t target-client
  positional: command (required)

command: copy-mode
  bool-flags: deHMqSu
  arg-flag: -s src-pane
  arg-flag: -t target-pane

  bool-flags: NZ
  arg-flag: -F format
  arg-flag: -f filter
  arg-flag: -t target-pane

command: delete-buffer
  alias: deleteb
  arg-flag: -b buffer-name

command: detach-client
  alias: detach
  bool-flags: aP
  arg-flag: -E shell-command
  arg-flag: -s target-session
  arg-flag: -t target-client

command: display-menu
  alias: menu
  bool-flags: MO
  arg-flag: -b border-lines
  arg-flag: -c target-client
  arg-flag: -C starting-choice
  arg-flag: -H selected-style
  arg-flag: -s style
  arg-flag: -S border-style
  arg-flag: -t target-pane
  arg-flag: -T title
  arg-flag: -x position
  arg-flag: -y position
  positional: name (required)
  positional: key (optional)
  positional: command (optional)

  bool-flags: aCIlNpv
  arg-flag: -c target-client
  arg-flag: -d delay
  arg-flag: -F format
  arg-flag: -t target-pane
  positional: message (optional)

command: display-popup
  alias: popup
  bool-flags: BCEkN
  arg-flag: -b border-lines
  arg-flag: -c target-client
  arg-flag: -d start-directory
  arg-flag: -e environment
  arg-flag: -h height
  arg-flag: -s style

  arg-flag: -w width
  arg-flag: -x position
  arg-flag: -y position
  positional: shell-command (optional)
  positional: argument (optional,variadic)

  bool-flags: bN
  arg-flag: -d duration
  arg-flag: -t target-client
  positional: template (optional)

  arg-flag: -t target-pane
  positional: match-string (required)

command: has-session
  alias: has
  arg-flag: -t target-session

  bool-flags: bF
  arg-flag: -t target-pane

  positional: command (optional)

  arg-flag: -t target-window

  alias: wait
  positional: -L|-S|-U (optional)
  positional: channel (required)
